first_paragraph: **[Lawn bowls at the 2022 Commonwealth Games](/wiki/Lawn_bowls_at_the_2022_Commonwealth_Games "Lawn bowls at the 2022 Commonwealth Games") – Men's triples** was held at the [Victoria Park](/wiki/Victoria_Park,_Leamington_Spa "Victoria Park, Leamington Spa") from July 29 to August 1.[[1]](#cite_note-schedule-1) A total of 48 athletes from 16 associations participated in the event.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

**[Lawn bowls at the 2022 Commonwealth Games](/wiki/Lawn_bowls_at_the_2022_Commonwealth_Games "Lawn bowls at the 2022 Commonwealth Games") – Men's triples** was held at the [Victoria Park](/wiki/Victoria_Park,_Leamington_Spa "Victoria Park, Leamington Spa") from July 29 to August 1.[[1]](#cite_note-schedule-1) A total of 48 athletes from 16 associations participated in the event.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Sectional play

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Lawn_bowls_at_the_2022_Commonwealth_Games_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_triples&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Sectional play")]

The top two from each section advance to the knockout stage.

### Section A

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Lawn_bowls_at_the_2022_Commonwealth_Games_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_triples&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Section A")]

| 2 | [Malta](/wiki/Malta_at_the_2022_Commonwealth_Games "Malta at the 2022 Commonwealth Games") | [Peter John Ellul](/w/index.php?title=Peter_John_Ellul&action=edit&redlink=1 "Peter John Ellul (page does not exist)"), [Troy Lorimer](/w/index.php?title=Troy_Lorimer&action=edit&redlink=1 "Troy Lorimer (page does not exist)"), [Shaun Parniss](/w/index.php?title=Shaun_Parniss&action=edit&redlink=1 "Shaun Parniss (page does not exist)") | 3 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 44 | 56 | –12 | **4** |

### Section B
